onboarding.title: Welcome to Ghostly
onboarding.tagline: Private, on-device voice transcription — works in any app.

features.onDevice: 100% on-device — your voice never leaves this computer
features.fast: Instant results — transcription in under a second
features.everywhere: Works anywhere — paste into any app, any text field

onboarding.recommendedReason: Recommended for most users. Fast and accurate for English and European languages.
onboarding.subtitle: To get started, choose a transcription model

parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v2.name: Parakeet V2
parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v2.description: English only. The best model for English speakers.

moonshine-base.name: Moonshine Base
moonshine-base.description: Very fast, English only. Handles accents well.

moonshine-small-streaming-en.name: Moonshine V2 Small
moonshine-small-streaming-en.description: Fast, English only. Good balance of speed and accuracy.

breeze-asr.name: Breeze ASR
breeze-asr.description: Optimized for Taiwanese Mandarin. Code-switching support.

sense-voice-int8.name: SenseVoice
sense-voice-int8.description: Very fast. Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, Cantonese.

gigaam-v3-e2e-ctc.name: GigaAM v3
gigaam-v3-e2e-ctc.description: Russian speech recognition. Fast and accurate.

canary-180m-flash.name: Canary 180M Flash
canary-180m-flash.description: Very fast. English, German, Spanish, French. Supports translation.

canary-1b-v2.name: Canary 1B v2
canary-1b-v2.description: Accurate multilingual. 25 European languages. Supports translation.

cohere-int8.name: Cohere
cohere-int8.description: A large, slower, but very accurate multilingual model.

permissions.title: Permissions Required
permissions.description: Ghostly needs a couple of permissions to work properly.

microphone.title: Microphone Access
microphone.description: Required to hear your voice for transcription.

accessibility.title: Accessibility Access
accessibility.description: Required to type transcribed text into your applications.

errors.checkFailed: Failed to check permissions. Please try again.
errors.requestFailed: Failed to request permission. Please try again.

modelSettings.title: {{model}} Settings
modelSettings.noSettingsNeeded: This model works automatically with no configuration needed.

shortcut.title: Shortcuts
shortcut.description: Keyboard shortcuts that trigger recording and transcription

transcribe.name: Record & Transcribe
transcribe.description: Hold to record. Release to transcribe and paste into the active app.

cancel.name: Cancel Recording
cancel.description: Cancel the current recording without transcribing.

transcribe_with_post_process.name: Transcribe & Refine
transcribe_with_post_process.description: Like the main shortcut, but always runs AI refinement on the result — regardless of your default setting.

errors.reset: Failed to reset shortcut to original value

language.title: Language
language.description: The spoken language Ghostly should expect. Auto detects automatically; picking a specific language can improve accuracy.
language.descriptionUnsupported: This model detects language automatically — no manual selection needed.

pushToTalk.label: Push to Talk
pushToTalk.description: Hold the shortcut to record; release to stop and transcribe.

models.title: Transcription Models
models.description: Select a transcription model or download additional models. Different models offer varying levels of accuracy and speed.
models.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{modelName}}? You will need to download it again to use it.
models.deleteActiveConfirm: {{modelName}} is your active model. Deleting it will stop transcriptions until you select a new model. Are you sure?

microphone.title: Microphone
microphone.description: Choose which microphone Ghostly listens to.

audioFeedback.label: Sound Feedback
audioFeedback.description: Play a chime when recording starts and stops.

soundTheme.label: Sound Theme
soundTheme.description: The sound played when recording starts and stops.

outputDevice.title: Feedback Speaker
outputDevice.description: Which speaker plays the start/stop chimes.

volume.title: Feedback Volume
volume.description: Volume level for the start/stop chimes.

experimentalToggle.label: Developer Mode
experimentalToggle.description: Unlock additional debug options for developers and power users.

lazyStreamClose.label: Warm Mic Mode
lazyStreamClose.description: Keeps the microphone open for 30 seconds after stopping, cutting startup delay for back-to-back dictation. May temporarily affect Bluetooth audio quality.

whisper.title: Whisper GPU Acceleration
whisper.description: Hardware acceleration for Whisper models. Auto uses GPU when available (Metal on macOS, Vulkan on Windows/Linux). Switch to CPU if you encounter stability issues.

ort.title: ONNX GPU Acceleration
ort.description: Hardware acceleration for ONNX-based models (Parakeet, Canary, Moonshine). DirectML on Windows is experimental and may cause transcription failures.

gpuDevice.title: GPU Device
gpuDevice.description: Which GPU to use for Whisper inference. Auto selects the best available device.

startHidden.label: Start in Background
startHidden.description: Launch Ghostly silently to the tray without opening the settings window.

autostart.label: Launch on Startup
autostart.description: Automatically start Ghostly when you log in to your computer.

showTrayIcon.label: Show Tray Icon
showTrayIcon.description: Display the Ghostly icon in the system tray.

overlay.title: Overlay Position
overlay.description: Display visual feedback overlay during recording and transcription. On Linux 'None' is recommended.

pasteMethod.title: How to Insert Text
pasteMethod.description: Clipboard (recommended): copies text then pastes with a keyboard shortcut. Direct: types characters one by one — use if clipboard paste is unreliable. None: captures to history only without pasting.

typingTool.title: Linux Typing Tool
typingTool.description: Which tool Ghostly uses for Direct text input on Linux. Auto detects the best available option for your setup.

clipboardHandling.title: After Pasting
clipboardHandling.description: Controls what happens to your clipboard after text is inserted.

autoSubmit.title: Send Automatically
autoSubmit.description: Press a key automatically after inserting text — useful for chat apps or search bars.

translateToEnglish.label: Translate to English
translateToEnglish.description: Automatically translate speech from other languages to English during transcription.
translateToEnglish.descriptionUnsupported: Translation is not supported by the {{model}} model.

modelUnload.title: Release Model Memory
modelUnload.description: Automatically unload the AI model from GPU/RAM after a period of inactivity. Lower values free memory sooner; higher values keep the model ready for faster recordings.

customWords.title: Correction Words
customWords.description: Words Ghostly should always prefer over similar-sounding alternatives. Great for proper nouns, brand names, or technical terms.

enable.label: Enable AI Refinement
enable.description: Use AI to clean up, format, or rephrase your transcriptions after they're captured. Requires an AI provider API key or Apple Intelligence.

provider.title: Provider
provider.description: Choose which AI service refines your transcriptions.

appleIntelligence.title: Apple Intelligence
appleIntelligence.description: Runs fully on-device. No API key or network access is required.
appleIntelligence.requirements: Requires an Apple Silicon Mac running macOS Tahoe (26.0) or later. Apple Intelligence must be enabled in System Settings.
appleIntelligence.unavailable: Apple Intelligence is not available on this device. Requires an Apple Silicon Mac running macOS Tahoe (26.0) or later with Apple Intelligence enabled in System Settings.

baseUrl.title: Base URL
baseUrl.description: API base URL for the selected provider. Only the custom provider can be edited.

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: API key for the selected provider.

model.title: Model
model.descriptionApple: Provide an optional numeric token limit or keep the default on-device preset.
model.descriptionCustom: Provide the model identifier expected by your custom endpoint.
model.descriptionDefault: Choose a model exposed by the selected provider.

prompts.title: Refinement Prompt

selectedPrompt.title: Active Prompt
selectedPrompt.description: Prompts define how the AI transforms your transcription. Use ${output} to reference the captured text.

prompts.promptLabelPlaceholder: e.g. Clean up, Email, Code review
prompts.promptInstructionsPlaceholder: Describe how to transform the transcription. Example: Fix grammar and punctuation for the following text: ${output}
prompts.promptTip: Tip: Use ${output} to insert the transcribed text in your prompt.
prompts.selectToEdit: Select a prompt above to edit it.
prompts.createFirst: Create a prompt to define how the AI should transform your transcriptions.

history.title: History
history.empty: No transcriptions yet — hold your shortcut and start speaking.
history.deleteError: Failed to delete entry. Please try again.
history.retranscribeError: Failed to retranscribe. Please try again.
history.transcriptionFailed: Transcription failed. You can retry using the retranscribe button.

logDirectory.title: Log Directory
logDirectory.description: Location where log files are stored

logLevel.title: Log Level
logLevel.description: Verbosity of log output. Info is recommended for normal use; Trace captures everything.

updateChecks.label: Automatic Updates
updateChecks.description: Check for new versions of Ghostly in the background and show a notice when one is available.

soundTheme.label: Sound Theme
soundTheme.description: The sound played when recording starts and stops.

wordCorrectionThreshold.title: Word Correction Sensitivity
wordCorrectionThreshold.description: How closely a word must match your correction list to be replaced. Lower = stricter; higher = more aggressive matching.

historyLimit.title: Keep Last N Transcriptions
historyLimit.description: Older entries are removed automatically once this limit is reached.

recordingRetention.title: Keep Recordings For
recordingRetention.description: Audio recordings can take up disk space. Delete them automatically after this period.

alwaysOnMicrophone.label: Warm Mic Mode
alwaysOnMicrophone.description: Keep the microphone active between recordings to reduce startup delay. Uses slightly more power.

clamshellMicrophone.title: Closed-Lid Microphone
clamshellMicrophone.description: Which microphone to use when your laptop lid is closed.

postProcessingToggle.label: Enable AI Refinement
postProcessingToggle.description: Use AI to clean up, format, or rephrase transcriptions after they're captured.

muteWhileRecording.label: Mute System Audio While Recording
muteWhileRecording.description: Silence other audio output while recording to prevent feedback.

appendTrailingSpace.label: Add Space After Pasting
appendTrailingSpace.description: Automatically append a space after the transcription is pasted, so the cursor is ready for the next word.

keyboardImplementation.title: Shortcut Engine
keyboardImplementation.description: How Ghostly listens for your keyboard shortcut. Ghostly Input Engine is lower-latency and recommended. System Shortcut is more compatible but may add a small delay.
keyboardImplementation.bindingsReset: Keyboard shortcuts were incompatible and have been reset to defaults

pasteDelay.title: Paste Delay (ms)
pasteDelay.description: Milliseconds to wait before sending the paste keystroke. Increase this if the wrong text is being pasted.

recordingBuffer.title: Release Buffer (ms)
recordingBuffer.description: Extra milliseconds to keep recording after you release the key, to capture the end of your sentence. 0 = no buffer.

appDataDirectory.title: App Data Directory
appDataDirectory.description: Location where Ghostly stores its data

whisper.title: Whisper.cpp
whisper.description: High-performance inference of OpenAI's Whisper automatic speech recognition model
whisper.details: Ghostly uses Whisper.cpp for fast, local speech-to-text processing. Thanks to the amazing work by Georgi Gerganov and contributors.

handy.title: Handy
handy.description: Ghostly is based on Handy by CJ Pais.
handy.details: Copyright (c) 2025 CJ Pais — MIT License. github.com/cjpais/Handy

profiles.title: Per-App Profiles

enable.title: Enable Per-App Profiles
enable.description: Automatically switch your AI prompt, vocabulary, and other settings based on which app is in focus when you transcribe.

profiles.detectCurrentHint: Switch focus to the target app, then click to prefill a matching rule.

fields.name: Name
fields.rulesHint: Any rule matching will activate this profile. Most specific rule first.
fields.rulesEmpty: No rules yet. Add one or detect the current app.
fields.customVocabHint: Merged with the global custom words list for this profile.

voiceEditing.title: Voice Editing

enable.title: Enable voice editing
enable.description: Keep a short buffer of recent transcriptions so you can revise your last paste by speaking an edit instruction.

voiceEditing.experimental: Experimental — may misfire in rich-text editors and fields where the cursor moved.

prefixDetection.title: Prefix detection
prefixDetection.description: Treat short utterances starting with phrases like 'fix that' or 'make it shorter' as edit commands. Risk of false positives — leave off unless you want it.

replaceStrategy.title: Replace strategy
replaceStrategy.description: How voice edits replace the previously pasted text.

bufferSize.title: Session buffer size
bufferSize.description: Number of recent transcriptions kept for voice-edit context.

idleTimeout.title: Session idle timeout
idleTimeout.description: Seconds before the session buffer expires and voice edits no longer chain off the last paste.

footer.portableUpdateMessage: Portable installs cannot be updated automatically. To update: download the latest NSIS installer from GitHub Releases, install it to the same folder, then copy your Data/ folder (settings, models, recordings) from the old version to the new one.

accessibility.permissionsDescription: Ghostly needs accessibility permissions to type transcribed text.

micPermissionDenied.generic: Microphone access was denied by the operating system. Please grant microphone permission in your system settings.
micPermissionDenied.windows: Enable microphone access in Settings → Privacy & security → Microphone (including desktop app access).
micPermissionDenied.macos: Grant microphone access in System Settings → Privacy & Security → Microphone.
micPermissionDenied.linux: Grant microphone access in your system's sound or privacy settings.

errors.noInputDevice: No audio input device was detected. Please connect a microphone or headset and try again.
errors.pasteFailed: Text could not be pasted into the active application.

appLanguage.title: Application Language
appLanguage.description: Change the language of the Ghostly interface
